## Meeting Purpose

[Prepare for the kickoff meeting with SpecterOps to align on stakeholders, content approval process, and success metrics for the upcoming content collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/tKKWcPMVC4iPVAyHkfroKauGhn32sydx?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content approval chain: Meshach → Jason → Wolf → Bryce → Jared (research), with Bryce as ultimate approver initially](https://fathom.video/share/tKKWcPMVC4iPVAyHkfroKauGhn32sydx?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Two main content focuses: Identity-focused APM messaging (more technical) and CISO-level content (executive-focused)](https://fathom.video/share/tKKWcPMVC4iPVAyHkfroKauGhn32sydx?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Success metrics: Increase in organic traffic, meaningful content engagement, and market positioning uplift](https://fathom.video/share/tKKWcPMVC4iPVAyHkfroKauGhn32sydx?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Product deep dive with Jason (PMM lead) and Jared (CTO) to be scheduled post-kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/tKKWcPMVC4iPVAyHkfroKauGhn32sydx?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)

## Topics

### Stakeholder Identification

  - [Main approvers: Meshach, Jason, Wolf, Bryce, and Jared Atkinson (research team)](https://fathom.video/share/tKKWcPMVC4iPVAyHkfroKauGhn32sydx?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Support roles: Garrett (data/analytics), Teofi (ABM strategy)](https://fathom.video/share/tKKWcPMVC4iPVAyHkfroKauGhn32sydx?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Ultimate approver: Bryce initially, transitioning to Meshach over time](https://fathom.video/share/tKKWcPMVC4iPVAyHkfroKauGhn32sydx?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [CMS staging/publishing: Rick (senior content manager) or Helena (director of corporate marketing)](https://fathom.video/share/tKKWcPMVC4iPVAyHkfroKauGhn32sydx?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)

### Content Strategy and Depth

  - [Two content buckets identified:](https://fathom.video/share/tKKWcPMVC4iPVAyHkfroKauGhn32sydx?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
    1.  Identity-focused APM messaging (more technical)
    2.  CISO-level content (executive-focused, less technical)
  - [Aim to maintain SpecterOps' technical expertise while elevating content for CISO audience](https://fathom.video/share/tKKWcPMVC4iPVAyHkfroKauGhn32sydx?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Jason (PMM lead) to guide positioning strategy based on ICP work](https://fathom.video/share/tKKWcPMVC4iPVAyHkfroKauGhn32sydx?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)

### Success Metrics and Goals

  - [Increase in organic traffic through GEO channel](https://fathom.video/share/tKKWcPMVC4iPVAyHkfroKauGhn32sydx?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Meaningful engagement with content](https://fathom.video/share/tKKWcPMVC4iPVAyHkfroKauGhn32sydx?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Improved market positioning in TAC path management](https://fathom.video/share/tKKWcPMVC4iPVAyHkfroKauGhn32sydx?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Resonance with both identity teams and CISOs](https://fathom.video/share/tKKWcPMVC4iPVAyHkfroKauGhn32sydx?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Uplift in content to match executive-level interests while maintaining technical credibility](https://fathom.video/share/tKKWcPMVC4iPVAyHkfroKauGhn32sydx?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)

### Kickoff Meeting Details

  - [Scheduled for Wednesday at 4:30 PM Eastern](https://fathom.video/share/tKKWcPMVC4iPVAyHkfroKauGhn32sydx?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Attendees: Meshach, Bryce, Rick, Tyler (GrowthX)](https://fathom.video/share/tKKWcPMVC4iPVAyHkfroKauGhn32sydx?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Jason (PMM lead) invited but attendance unconfirmed](https://fathom.video/share/tKKWcPMVC4iPVAyHkfroKauGhn32sydx?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Resource Sharing

  - [Examples of high-quality SpecterOps content requested](https://fathom.video/share/tKKWcPMVC4iPVAyHkfroKauGhn32sydx?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)
  - [Competitor content examples for benchmarking](https://fathom.video/share/tKKWcPMVC4iPVAyHkfroKauGhn32sydx?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)
  - [ICP documentation, brand guidelines, sales decks, or other relevant materials to be shared in Slack](https://fathom.video/share/tKKWcPMVC4iPVAyHkfroKauGhn32sydx?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Meshach to forward meeting invite to Jason and confirm attendance](https://fathom.video/share/tKKWcPMVC4iPVAyHkfroKauGhn32sydx?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Schedule product deep dive with Jason and Jared post-kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/tKKWcPMVC4iPVAyHkfroKauGhn32sydx?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Meshach to share requested resources in Slack channel before Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/tKKWcPMVC4iPVAyHkfroKauGhn32sydx?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)
  - [GrowthX team to review shared resources prior to kickoff meeting](https://fathom.video/share/tKKWcPMVC4iPVAyHkfroKauGhn32sydx?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)
  - [Proceed with kickoff meeting on Wednesday at 4:30 PM Eastern](https://fathom.video/share/tKKWcPMVC4iPVAyHkfroKauGhn32sydx?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
